# Nested Endpoint Submodule

<!-- markdownlint-disable MD033 -->
## Requirements

The following requirements are needed by this module:

- <a name="requirement_terraform"></a> [terraform](#requirement\_terraform) (~> 1.5)

- <a name="requirement_azapi"></a> [azapi](#requirement\_azapi) (~> 2.4)

## Resources

The following resources are used by this module:

- [azapi_resource.this](https://registry.terraform.io/providers/Azure/azapi/latest/docs/resources/resource) (resource)

<!-- markdownlint-disable MD013 -->
## Required Inputs

The following input variables are required:

### <a name="input_min_child_endpoints"></a> [min\_child\_endpoints](#input\_min\_child\_endpoints)

Description: The minimum number of endpoints that must be available in the child profile in order for the parent profile to be considered available.

Type: `number`

### <a name="input_name"></a> [name](#input\_name)

Description: The name of the nested endpoint.

Type: `string`

### <a name="input_target_resource_id"></a> [target\_resource\_id](#input\_target\_resource\_id)

Description: The Azure Resource URI of the nested Traffic Manager profile.

Type: `string`

### <a name="input_traffic_manager_profile_id"></a> [traffic\_manager\_profile\_id](#input\_traffic\_manager\_profile\_id)

Description: The resource ID of the parent Traffic Manager profile.

Type: `string`

## Optional Inputs

The following input variables are optional (have default values):

### <a name="input_always_serve"></a> [always\_serve](#input\_always\_serve)

Description: If Always Serve is enabled, probing for endpoint health will be disabled.

Type: `string`

Default: `"Disabled"`

### <a name="input_custom_headers"></a> [custom\_headers](#input\_custom\_headers)

Description: List of custom headers.

Type:

```hcl
list(object({
    name  = string
    value = string
  }))
```

Default: `[]`

### <a name="input_enabled"></a> [enabled](#input\_enabled)

Description: Whether the endpoint is enabled.

Type: `bool`

Default: `true`

### <a name="input_endpoint_location"></a> [endpoint\_location](#input\_endpoint\_location)

Description: Specifies the location of the endpoint when using the Performance traffic routing method.

Type: `string`

Default: `null`

### <a name="input_geo_mapping"></a> [geo\_mapping](#input\_geo\_mapping)

Description: The list of countries/regions mapped to this endpoint when using the Geographic traffic routing method.

Type: `list(string)`

Default: `null`

### <a name="input_min_child_endpoints_ipv4"></a> [min\_child\_endpoints\_ipv4](#input\_min\_child\_endpoints\_ipv4)

Description: The minimum number of IPv4 (DNS record type A) endpoints that must be available in the child profile.

Type: `number`

Default: `null`

### <a name="input_min_child_endpoints_ipv6"></a> [min\_child\_endpoints\_ipv6](#input\_min\_child\_endpoints\_ipv6)

Description: The minimum number of IPv6 (DNS record type AAAA) endpoints that must be available in the child profile.

Type: `number`

Default: `null`

### <a name="input_priority"></a> [priority](#input\_priority)

Description: The priority of this endpoint (1-1000) when using the Priority traffic routing method.

Type: `number`

Default: `null`

### <a name="input_subnets"></a> [subnets](#input\_subnets)

Description: The list of subnets, IP addresses, and/or address ranges mapped to this endpoint when using the Subnet traffic routing method.

Type:

```hcl
list(object({
    first = string
    last  = optional(string)
    scope = optional(number)
  }))
```

Default: `[]`

### <a name="input_weight"></a> [weight](#input\_weight)

Description: The weight of this endpoint (1-1000) when using the Weighted traffic routing method.

Type: `number`

Default: `null`

## Outputs

The following outputs are exported:

### <a name="output_id"></a> [id](#output\_id)

Description: The resource ID of the nested endpoint.

### <a name="output_name"></a> [name](#output\_name)

Description: The name of the nested endpoint.

### <a name="output_resource"></a> [resource](#output\_resource)

Description: The nested endpoint resource.

### <a name="output_resource_id"></a> [resource\_id](#output\_resource\_id)

Description: The resource ID of the nested endpoint.

## Modules

No modules.
